ab: djavadjavai a masantalj, tucu uri kacuin mun ni sinsi a vaik a kivalja tua marka ramaljmaljeng i qinaljan.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: ui nanguaq! uri ki qaqivuan amen tua marka ramaljemaljeng a penayuanan.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說排灣語。
en: B: Okay! We have to speak Paiwanese to the seniors.

ab: uri djemaljudjaljun anga itjen?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: uri djemaljudjaljun anga.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: vuvu, mangtjetj amen a ljemilji tjanusun.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: na! saigu mun a penayuanan! nanguaq aravac!
ch: B:你們會說排灣語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You speak Paiwanese! That’s great!

ab: djavadjavai a masantalj, tucu uri kacuin mun ni sinsi a sema tua pu vaquan a murisengsengan.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: ui, sinsi.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: kelu samazau a marasudj, paqenetju a kemacu a nu sipurisengsengan.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: ui, sinsi, niya kinacu anga nia sipurisengsengan.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: djemaljun anga itjen?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: ini inkanan a djemaljun, cemadja anan.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: sau djiqesu.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: sau djiqesu tua zaljum.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: ui, tiaken nai a djemiqes.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: sau alapu tua sivilavilad tua qayaqayam.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: ui, vaik aken a venilad tua qayaqayam.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: djavadjavai a masantalj, uri vaik itejn a sema tua pu qemuziquzipan tucu.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: ui! Nanguaq aravac! uri pakatanema itjen a vaik?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: uri maka Basu itjen a vaik.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: kacumalii a masantalj, uri veneli anga itjen tua kippu.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: ui.
en: B: Yes.

ab: a i sangas mana pu qayaqayaman, a i tjaivililj mana pu qatjuvian, sa tjarapacucuni tua marka nemanga.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: sinsi marekutj aken tua qatjuvi.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: inika makuda, sau pacunu tua qayaqayam numaya.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: nu cemalivat anga tua ita a zikangan samazai anga a matevetevelj.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: ui, pinakalevan sinsi.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: anema su pinacunan tucu?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: napacun aken tua liyaw a qatjuvu, sa izuanan a liyaw a qayaqayam.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: adjeljuayu, uri vaik anga itjen. pakirimu, uri vaik anga itjen.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: kaljavau anan aken, mazeli arava a ku kula.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: vaiki a ljemangui ui?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: ui nanguaq! ari!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: tjuruvu aravac a caucau a ljemanguljangi imaza.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: qaca aravac a zaljum i zua, nanguaq a tjaljumaza itjen a ljemangui.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
